reasoning: Koren, we're addressing your lactate clearance limiter by focusing on over-unders. Your last ride suggests a solid endurance base, but we need to improve lactate shuttling to hold power on sustained climbs. This session mimics the Alpine Loop's demands, especially tackling climbs like Emigration Canyon.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Perform 3 sets of 8-minute over-unders: 1 min at 242-256W followed by 3 mins at 201-218W, repeat twice. Rest 2 mins between sets.

weekly_focus: This week: progressive loading — keep attacking the lactate clearance gap.
